data.description: Fix Foolery to honor Knots profile state-level owners during runtime queue ownership derivation. Currently, when a knot has agent-level ownership at the state level in its Knots profile, Foolery incorrectly collapses ownership to the broader step level and sets requiresHumanAction=true, which blocks autonomous execution. This prevents a knot from advancing autonomously from planning to ready_for_plan_review when that state is agent-owned. Investigate the Knots adapter and runtime queue ownership logic, patch to preserve state-level owners, add regression tests to prevent recurrence, and leave the knot in its current non-terminal state after completion.
